allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for line in lines: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role',''\) if role in ['user','assistant']: content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]: {c[\\"text\\"][:300]}'\) print\('---'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:300]}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
